title: Responsive Navbar

statement.markdown:
## Responsive Navbar Challenge

Create a responsive navbar with a hamburger menu and logo.

### Requirements
1. Use Tailwind CSS classes for styling.
2. The navbar should be responsive and work on all screen sizes.
3. The navbar should have a hamburger menu that toggles on small screens.
4. The navbar should have a logo that appears on smaller screens.

constraints: Use Tailwind CSS classes for styling.
Navbar should be responsive and work on all screen sizes.
Navbar should have a hamburger menu that toggles on small screens.
Navbar should have a logo that appears on smaller screens.
